---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that biasguard makes hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it fits an existing extension point (a new `IntegrityCheck`, execution
profile, indicator, or bootstrap), say so — most additions shouldn't need engine changes.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Scope

- [ ] This preserves the framework's guarantees (causality, determinism, mandatory costs).
- [ ] This is on the [roadmap](../../docs/roadmap.md) / I've checked it isn't already tracked.
